sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Serotonin EDP | Calm & Balance in Every Spray

Slow down and breathe easy with Serotonin — a soft and calming fragrance made to bring peace to your day. Gentle and comforting, this scent helps you relax, clear your mind, and feel balanced from within.

Perfect for slow mornings, quiet evenings, or moments when you just need a break. Serotonin feels clean, soothing, and easy to wear — like a deep breath after a long day.

🌿 Key Benefits:

• 
Gentle, calming scent that helps you relax

• 
Pocket-friendly Format ensures easy, subtle application

• 
Ideal for Mindfulness Moments or dinner dates

• 
Feel-Good Fragrance that reduces stress

This Eau De Parfum is long-lasting and leaves a soft, peaceful trail around you.

Calm. Gentle. Comforting.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
• Fragrance Profile – Sweet and warm scent designed to create a happy, uplifting feel.

• Long-Lasting Formula – Eau De Parfum concentration for extended wear.

• Travel-Friendly Design – Compact size for easy carry and on-the-go use.

• Clean Composition – Free from parabens and sulphates for a safer experience.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
Top note - Cinnamon, Honey, Osmanthus

Middle note - Ambergris, Benzoin, Labdanum

Base Note - Tonka Bean, Vanilla, Patchouli

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
• Calm Energy – Helps you feel peaceful and emotionally balanced.

• Stress Relief – Soothes your senses after a long day.

• Gentle Presence – Creates a soft and comforting aura around you.

• Inner Balance – Supports a relaxed and steady mindset.

• Soft & Clean Vibe – Leaves a fresh, light, and calming trail.

• Compact – Easy to carry, reapply whenever needed.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Gently roll the perfume on pulse points – wrists, neck, and behind ears.

Apply directly on clean, dry skin for best results.

Reapply anytime for a refreshing boost of fragrance.

Perfect to carry in your bag for on-the-go elegance. ✨
